label: Privy App ID
description: Client-side app identifier for Privy social login (Twitter + Farcaster) authentication flow.

label: Privy App Secret
description: Server-side secret for verifying Privy JWT tokens in the auth verification endpoint.

label: OpenAI API Key
description: API key for LLM calls in both Feed aggregator entity extraction and Markets scanner pipeline.

label: X (Twitter) Bearer Token
description: Bearer token for fetching tweet content in Markets scanner when user inputs Twitter URLs.

label: Jina Reader API Key
description: API key for article content scraping in both Feed aggregator and Markets scanner pipelines.

label: Quotient Intelligence API Key
description: API key for AI fair-odds data to display edge badges on Polymarket prediction cards.
